title: Backstabbed modpack
description: A very good Minecraft modpack to make my friends spin! 很好的整合包，使我的朋友旋转！
body:
An Minecraft Pack that optimizes the gaming experience of Minecraft Java Edition.
<details>
<summary>English</summary>
"XCC's optimize modpack," with its outstanding optimization and carefully selected mods, provides players with a deeply customized Minecraft experience. First of all, its optimization features are noteworthy; the integrated Sodium mod efficiently boosts the game's frame rate (FPS), while Iris Shades gives the game a new visual treatment at night, ensuring that both sunlight and starlit skies are stunning.

In terms of mod content, this modpack is very popular, introducing map management tools like Xearo's mini map and Xearo's world map, as well as other auxiliary mods such as Tom's Simple Storage Mod, making resource management easy and convenient. The CustomSkinLoader mod allows characters to have personalized appearances, adding fun and individuality to the game.

The key point is that the modpack specifically offers players a rich collection of electrical mods, including Tweakeroo, Litematica, and Mini Hub, making it easier for players to create and utilize Minecraft's features to enhance their gaming experience.

Overall, XCC's optimize modpack is an ideal choice for Minecraft players looking to explore fun, improve efficiency, and unleash their creativity.
</details>

<details>
<summary>中文（简体）</summary>
"XCC's optimize modpack"以其卓越的优化与精心挑选的模组，为玩家带来了深度定制的Minecraft体验。首先，其优化特点不容忽视，集成的钠（Sodium）模组高效提升了游戏帧数（FPS），而Iris Shades则赋予游戏夜晚全新的特色视觉处理，确保无论是日照还是星空，都美轮美奂。

在mod内容上，这个modpack备受欢迎，引入了地图管理工具，如Xearo's mini map和Xearo's world map，还有其他辅助模组，如Tom's Simple Storage Mod（汤姆的简易存储），让资源管理变得轻松便捷。万用皮肤补丁（CustomSkinLoader）模组赋予角色个性化的别样容貌，增加了游戏的趣味性和个性化元素。

核心要点在于，modpack专门为玩家提供了丰富的生电模组集合，包括tweakeroo、投影 (Litematica)以及Mini Hub，便于玩家创造并利用Minecraft游戏特性来丰富自己的游玩体验。

总体来说，XCC's optimize modpack是Minecraft玩家探索乐趣、提高效率和发挥创造能力的理想选择。
</details>

<details>
<summary>中文（繁体）</summary>
"XCC's optimize modpack"以其卓越的優化與精心挑選的模組，為玩家帶來了深度定製的Minecraft體驗。首先，其優化特點不容忽視，集成的鈉（Sodium）模組高效提升了遊戲幀數（FPS），而Iris Shades則賦予遊戲夜晚全新的特色視覺處理，確保無論是日照還是星空，都美輪美奐。

在mod內容上，這個modpack備受歡迎，引入了地圖管理工具，如Xearo's mini map和Xearo's world map，還有其他輔助模組，如Tom's Simple Storage Mod（湯姆的簡易存儲），讓資源管理變得輕松便捷。萬用皮膚補丁（CustomSkinLoader）模組賦予角色個性化的別樣容貌，增加了遊戲的趣味性和個性化元素。

核心要點在於，modpack專門為玩家提供了豐富的生電模組集合，包括tweakeroo、投影 (Litematica)以及Mini Hub，便於玩家創造並利用Minecraft遊戲特性來豐富自己的遊玩體驗。

總體來說，XCC's optimize modpack是Minecraft玩家探索樂趣、提高效率和發揮創造能力的理想選擇。
</details>
